notes: Choose "Play Advent Rising" not "Play Game" otherwise nothing happens. Disabling Esync seems to stop the random "General Protection Faults" that crash the game. Still very jerky in places, but is generally playable
title: Advent Rising

notes:
Fisrt started the game wiht the files what steam download, after i remembered it have a unofficial patch called Advent Revising v2 what adds a lot of cutscences from the xbox version, plus fix a lot of error, plus enables 16:9 screenratio for the game. Just copied over the files and since than i was playin and enjoyin that awesome music what the game have. Without troubles.

OOB the game time to times crashed with "General Protection Faults", after the unoddicial patch its runs smoothly.
title: Advent Rising
